---
title: "Nan_Bal_Meeting_May23"
author: "Naman Kishan Rastogi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.





########################################## **Dry** ##################################
############################## **Precipitation and SST to streamflow Q**#############

**Bayes Factor analysis**
```{r}
set.seed(123)  
rm(list = ls(all=TRUE))  
library(tidyverse)  
library(lubridate) 
library(bnlearn) 
```

**CONVERT DATA INTO NORMAL QUANTILES**
```{r}
NQ <- function(datain){
  emp.cdf <- ecdf(datain)
  ecdf.prob <- emp.cdf(datain)
  max_datain <- max(datain) 
  val_range <- max(datain)-min(datain) 
  maxrow <- which(datain == max_datain) 
  datain[maxrow]=-Inf
  
  second_max <- max(datain) 
  diff <- max_datain - second_max 
  second_max_prob <- max(ecdf.prob[ecdf.prob<1]) 
  adj_prob <- second_max_prob + (diff/val_range)*(1-second_max_prob)  
  ecdf.prob[maxrow] <- adj_prob
  
  norm.quantiles <- qnorm(ecdf.prob,mean = 0, sd = 1)
  return(norm.quantiles)
}

NQ_median.flow <- function(datain,median.flow){
  if (median.flow>max(datain)){
    return(2)
  }
  else{
    datain<- c(datain,median.flow)
    quantiles <- NQ(datain)
    norm.quantile <- quantiles[length(quantiles)]
    return(norm.quantile)
  }
}

```

**Estimate Truncated Normal Parameters**
```{r}
estimate_truncated_normal_parameters <- function(nmean, nsd, upper, lower){
  a <- (lower-nmean)/nsd
  b <- (upper-nmean)/nsd
  trunc.mean = nmean + ((dnorm(a)-dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))*nsd
  if (b==Inf){
    term1 = (a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  if (a==-Inf){
    term1 <- -1*(b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  term2 <- -1*((dnorm(b)-dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))**2
  trunc.sd = sqrt(nsd**2 * (1+term1+term2))
  return(list(mean = trunc.mean, sd = trunc.sd))
}
```



**Define Bayesian Network Structure**
```{r}
dag <- model2network("[P][SST][Q|P:SST]")
print(dag)
setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Early/")

png("Grid1BN_DAG.png", width = 1000, height = 800)

plot(dag, 
     main = "Bayesian Network DAG",  
     sub = "Causal Relationships Between Variables",
     col = "black",  
     lwd = 2,  
     cex.main = 1.5, 
     cex.sub = 1.2,  
     cex = 1.3,  
     mar = c(5, 5, 5, 5))  

dev.off()

print("Bayesian Network DAG saved as 'Bayesian_Network_DAG.png' with improved visibility")

```


**standard normal**
```{r}

library(readr)

input_dir  <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Early"
output_dir <- file.path(input_dir, "Normalized_Quantiles")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)


to_normal_quantile <- function(x) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ranks <- rank(x, ties.method = "average", na.last = "keep")
  u <- (ranks - 0.5) / n
  z <- qnorm(u)
  return(z)
}


for (i in 1:4487) {
  
  file_in  <- file.path(input_dir, paste0("grid", i, ".csv"))
  file_out <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv"))
  
  if (!file.exists(file_in)) {
    cat(" Missing:", i, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  df <- read_csv(file_in, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  df_norm <- df
  for (col in colnames(df)) {
    if (is.numeric(df[[col]])) {
      df_norm[[col]] <- to_normal_quantile(df[[col]])
    }
  }
  
  write_csv(df_norm, file_out)
  
  cat("Done grid:", i, "\n")
}



```



**Early Dry**
```{r}
library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)

setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Early//Normalized_Quantiles/")

check.DJF <- -0.4912692

cv_dir <- "DryCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}

correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  
  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }

  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)

  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }

  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)

  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)

  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)

  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  
  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  
  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  
  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")

  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("DryCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  
  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}

write.csv(correlation_summary, "DryCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Dry_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**standard normal**
```{r}
library(readr)

input_dir  <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Peak/"
output_dir <- file.path(input_dir, "Normalized_Quantiles")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)


to_normal_quantile <- function(x) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ranks <- rank(x, ties.method = "average", na.last = "keep")
  u <- (ranks - 0.5) / n
  z <- qnorm(u)
  return(z)
}


for (i in 1:4487) {
  
  file_in  <- file.path(input_dir, paste0("grid", i, ".csv"))
  file_out <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv"))
  
  if (!file.exists(file_in)) {
    cat(" Missing:", i, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  df <- read_csv(file_in, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  df_norm <- df
  for (col in colnames(df)) {
    if (is.numeric(df[[col]])) {
      df_norm[[col]] <- to_normal_quantile(df[[col]])
    }
  }
  
  write_csv(df_norm, file_out)
  
  cat("Done grid:", i, "\n")
}

```


**Peak Dry**
```{r}
library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)

setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Peak//Normalized_Quantiles/")

check.DJF <- -0.4912692

cv_dir <- "DryCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}

correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  
  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }

  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)

  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }

  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)

  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)

  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)

  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  
  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  
  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  
  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")

  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("DryCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  
  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}

write.csv(correlation_summary, "DryCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Dry_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


**standard normal**
```{r}
library(readr)

input_dir  <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Late"
output_dir <- file.path(input_dir, "Normalized_Quantiles")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)


to_normal_quantile <- function(x) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ranks <- rank(x, ties.method = "average", na.last = "keep")
  u <- (ranks - 0.5) / n
  z <- qnorm(u)
  return(z)
}


for (i in 1:4487) {
  
  file_in  <- file.path(input_dir, paste0("grid", i, ".csv"))
  file_out <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv"))
  
  if (!file.exists(file_in)) {
    cat(" Missing:", i, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  df <- read_csv(file_in, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  df_norm <- df
  for (col in colnames(df)) {
    if (is.numeric(df[[col]])) {
      df_norm[[col]] <- to_normal_quantile(df[[col]])
    }
  }
  
  write_csv(df_norm, file_out)
  
  cat("Done grid:", i, "\n")
}

```



**Late Dry**
```{r}
library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)

setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Late//Normalized_Quantiles/")

check.DJF <- -0.4912692

cv_dir <- "DryCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}

correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  
  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }

  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)

  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }

  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)

  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)

  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)

  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  
  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  
  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  
  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")

  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("DryCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  
  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}

write.csv(correlation_summary, "DryCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Dry_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


**standard normal**
```{r}
library(readr)

input_dir  <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Monsoon/"
output_dir <- file.path(input_dir, "Normalized_Quantiles")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)


to_normal_quantile <- function(x) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ranks <- rank(x, ties.method = "average", na.last = "keep")
  u <- (ranks - 0.5) / n
  z <- qnorm(u)
  return(z)
}


for (i in 1:4487) {
  
  file_in  <- file.path(input_dir, paste0("grid", i, ".csv"))
  file_out <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv"))
  
  if (!file.exists(file_in)) {
    cat(" Missing:", i, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  df <- read_csv(file_in, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  df_norm <- df
  for (col in colnames(df)) {
    if (is.numeric(df[[col]])) {
      df_norm[[col]] <- to_normal_quantile(df[[col]])
    }
  }
  
  write_csv(df_norm, file_out)
  
  cat("Done grid:", i, "\n")
}

```



**Monsoon Dry**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Monsoon/Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- -0.4912692


cv_dir <- "DryCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("DryCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "DryCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Dry_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




########################################## **WET** ##################################
##############################**precipitation and SST to streamflow Q **#############
**Bayes Factor analysis**
```{r}
set.seed(123) 
rm(list = ls(all=TRUE))  
library(tidyverse) 
library(lubridate)  
library(bnlearn)  
```

**CONVERT DATA INTO NORMAL QUANTILES**
```{r}
NQ <- function(datain){
  emp.cdf <- ecdf(datain)
  ecdf.prob <- emp.cdf(datain)
  max_datain <- max(datain) 
  val_range <- max(datain)-min(datain) 
  #maxrow <- which.max(datain) # row corresponding to max data
  maxrow <- which(datain == max_datain) 
  datain[maxrow]=-Inf
  
  second_max <- max(datain) 
  diff <- max_datain - second_max 
  second_max_prob <- max(ecdf.prob[ecdf.prob<1]) 
  adj_prob <- second_max_prob + (diff/val_range)*(1-second_max_prob)  
  

  ecdf.prob[maxrow] <- adj_prob
  
  norm.quantiles <- qnorm(ecdf.prob,mean = 0, sd = 1)
  return(norm.quantiles)
}


NQ_median.flow <- function(datain,median.flow){
  if (median.flow>max(datain)){
    return(2)
  }
  else{
    datain<- c(datain,median.flow)
    quantiles <- NQ(datain)
    norm.quantile <- quantiles[length(quantiles)]
    return(norm.quantile)
  }
}

```

**Estimate Truncated Normal Parameters**
```{r}
estimate_truncated_normal_parameters <- function(nmean, nsd, upper, lower){
  a <- (lower-nmean)/nsd
  b <- (upper-nmean)/nsd
  trunc.mean = nmean + ((dnorm(a)-dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))*nsd
  if (b==Inf){
    term1 = (a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  if (a==-Inf){
    term1 <- -1*(b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  #term1 <- (b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)) + (-a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  term2 <- -1*((dnorm(b)-dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))**2
  trunc.sd = sqrt(nsd**2 * (1+term1+term2))
  return(list(mean = trunc.mean, sd = trunc.sd))
}
```


**Define Bayesian Network Structure**
```{r}
dag <- model2network("[P][SST][Q|P:SST]")
print(dag)
setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Early///")


png("Grid1BN_DAG.png", width = 1000, height = 800)


plot(dag, 
     main = "Bayesian Network DAG",  
     sub = "Causal Relationships Between Variables",
     col = "black",  
     lwd = 2,  
     cex.main = 1.5,  
     cex.sub = 1.2,  
     cex = 1.3,  
     mar = c(5, 5, 5, 5))  


dev.off()

print("Bayesian Network DAG saved as 'Bayesian_Network_DAG.png' with improved visibility")

```


**Early Wet**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Early///Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- 0.4912692


cv_dir <- "WetCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("WetCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "WetCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


**Peak Wet**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Peak////Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- 0.4912692


cv_dir <- "WetCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("WetCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "WetCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**Late Wet**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Late////Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- 0.4912692


cv_dir <- "WetCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("WetCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "WetCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**Monsoon Wet**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Monsoon////Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- 0.4912692


cv_dir <- "WetCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("WetCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "WetCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```





########################################## **Normal** ##################################
##############################**Precipitation and SST to streamflow Q**#############
**Bayes Factor analysis**
```{r}
set.seed(123) 
rm(list = ls(all=TRUE))  
library(tidyverse) 
library(lubridate)  
library(bnlearn)  
```

**CONVERT DATA INTO NORMAL QUANTILES**
```{r}
NQ <- function(datain){
  emp.cdf <- ecdf(datain)
  ecdf.prob <- emp.cdf(datain)
  max_datain <- max(datain) 
  val_range <- max(datain)-min(datain) 
  #maxrow <- which.max(datain) # row corresponding to max data
  maxrow <- which(datain == max_datain) 
  datain[maxrow]=-Inf
  
  second_max <- max(datain) 
  diff <- max_datain - second_max 
  second_max_prob <- max(ecdf.prob[ecdf.prob<1]) 
  adj_prob <- second_max_prob + (diff/val_range)*(1-second_max_prob)  
  

  ecdf.prob[maxrow] <- adj_prob
  
  norm.quantiles <- qnorm(ecdf.prob,mean = 0, sd = 1)
  return(norm.quantiles)
}


NQ_median.flow <- function(datain,median.flow){
  if (median.flow>max(datain)){
    return(2)
  }
  else{
    datain<- c(datain,median.flow)
    quantiles <- NQ(datain)
    norm.quantile <- quantiles[length(quantiles)]
    return(norm.quantile)
  }
}

```

**Estimate Truncated Normal Parameters**
```{r}
estimate_truncated_normal_parameters <- function(nmean, nsd, upper, lower){
  a <- (lower-nmean)/nsd
  b <- (upper-nmean)/nsd
  trunc.mean = nmean + ((dnorm(a)-dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))*nsd
  if (b==Inf){
    term1 = (a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  if (a==-Inf){
    term1 <- -1*(b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  #term1 <- (b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)) + (-a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  term2 <- -1*((dnorm(b)-dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))**2
  trunc.sd = sqrt(nsd**2 * (1+term1+term2))
  return(list(mean = trunc.mean, sd = trunc.sd))
}
```


**Define Bayesian Network Structure**
```{r}
dag <- model2network("[P][SST][Q|P:SST]")
print(dag)
setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Early")


png("Grid1BN_DAG.png", width = 1000, height = 800)


plot(dag, 
     main = "Bayesian Network DAG",  
     sub = "Causal Relationships Between Variables",
     col = "black",  
     lwd = 2,  
     cex.main = 1.5,  
     cex.sub = 1.2,  
     cex = 1.3,  
     mar = c(5, 5, 5, 5))  


dev.off()

print("Bayesian Network DAG saved as 'Bayesian_Network_DAG.png' with improved visibility")

```


**Early Normal**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Early/Normalized_Quantiles/")

# Define normal range thresholds
check.lower <- -0.4912692
check.upper <-  0.4912692


cv_dir <- "NormalCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()

# Loop over all grid files (adjust range if not 4487)
for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    lower = check.lower,
    upper = check.upper,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("NormalCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "NormalCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Normal_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


**Peak Normal**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Peak//Normalized_Quantiles/")

# Define normal range thresholds
check.lower <- -0.4912692
check.upper <-  0.4912692


cv_dir <- "NormalCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()

# Loop over all grid files (adjust range if not 4487)
for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    lower = check.lower,
    upper = check.upper,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("NormalCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "NormalCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Normal_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**Late Normal**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Late//Normalized_Quantiles/")

# Define normal range thresholds
check.lower <- -0.4912692
check.upper <-  0.4912692


cv_dir <- "NormalCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()

# Loop over all grid files (adjust range if not 4487)
for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    lower = check.lower,
    upper = check.upper,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("NormalCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "NormalCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Normal_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**Monsoon Normal**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Monsoon//Normalized_Quantiles/")

# Define normal range thresholds
check.lower <- -0.4912692
check.upper <-  0.4912692


cv_dir <- "NormalCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()

# Loop over all grid files (adjust range if not 4487)
for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    lower = check.lower,
    upper = check.upper,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("NormalCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "NormalCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Normal_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**get the correlation between sst and streamflow**

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P//Early////")

correlation_results <- data.frame(
  Grid_Number = integer(),
  Corr_SST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_Q_P = numeric()
)

for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_name <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  
  if (file.exists(file_name)) {
    data <- read_csv(file_name, show_col_types = FALSE)
    
    required_cols <- c("SST", "P", "Q")
    if (all(required_cols %in% names(data))) {
      
      corr_vals <- c(
        cor(data$SST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$Q, data$P, use = "complete.obs")
      )
      
      correlation_results <- rbind(correlation_results, 
                                   data.frame(Grid_Number = i,
                                              Corr_SST_P = corr_vals[1],
                                              Corr_SST_Q = corr_vals[2],
                                              Corr_Q_P = corr_vals[3]))
    } else {
      cat("Skipping grid", i, ": Missing required columns\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("File missing:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}

write_csv(correlation_results, "Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

cat("Done! Total grids processed:", nrow(correlation_results), "\n")







library(readr)
library(dplyr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Peak/////")


correlation_results <- data.frame(
  Grid_Number = integer(),
  Corr_SST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_Q_P = numeric()
)


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_name <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (file.exists(file_name)) {

    data <- read_csv(file_name, show_col_types = FALSE)
    

    required_cols <- c("SST", "P", "Q")
    if (all(required_cols %in% names(data))) {
      

      corr_vals <- c(
        cor(data$SST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$Q, data$P, use = "complete.obs")
      )
      

      correlation_results <- rbind(correlation_results, 
                                   data.frame(Grid_Number = i,
                                              Corr_SST_P = corr_vals[1],
                                              Corr_SST_Q = corr_vals[2],
                                              Corr_Q_P = corr_vals[3]))
    } else {
      cat("Skipping grid", i, ": Missing required columns\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("File missing:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}


write_csv(correlation_results, "Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

cat("Done! Total grids processed:", nrow(correlation_results), "\n")







library(readr)
library(dplyr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Late/////")


correlation_results <- data.frame(
  Grid_Number = integer(),
  Corr_SST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_Q_P = numeric()
)


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_name <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (file.exists(file_name)) {

    data <- read_csv(file_name, show_col_types = FALSE)
    

    required_cols <- c("SST", "P", "Q")
    if (all(required_cols %in% names(data))) {
      

      corr_vals <- c(
        cor(data$SST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$Q, data$P, use = "complete.obs")
      )
      

      correlation_results <- rbind(correlation_results, 
                                   data.frame(Grid_Number = i,
                                              Corr_SST_P = corr_vals[1],
                                              Corr_SST_Q = corr_vals[2],
                                              Corr_Q_P = corr_vals[3]))
    } else {
      cat("Skipping grid", i, ": Missing required columns\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("File missing:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}


write_csv(correlation_results, "Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

cat("Done! Total grids processed:", nrow(correlation_results), "\n")






library(readr)
library(dplyr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/Monsoon/////")


correlation_results <- data.frame(
  Grid_Number = integer(),
  Corr_SST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_Q_P = numeric()
)


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_name <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (file.exists(file_name)) {

    data <- read_csv(file_name, show_col_types = FALSE)
    

    required_cols <- c("SST", "P", "Q")
    if (all(required_cols %in% names(data))) {
      

      corr_vals <- c(
        cor(data$SST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$Q, data$P, use = "complete.obs")
      )
      

      correlation_results <- rbind(correlation_results, 
                                   data.frame(Grid_Number = i,
                                              Corr_SST_P = corr_vals[1],
                                              Corr_SST_Q = corr_vals[2],
                                              Corr_Q_P = corr_vals[3]))
    } else {
      cat("Skipping grid", i, ": Missing required columns\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("File missing:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}


write_csv(correlation_results, "Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

cat("Done! Total grids processed:", nrow(correlation_results), "\n")


```




**merge the data: bayes factor correlation into single csv file**
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(readr)

setwd("D:/Onedrive_data/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Causality_Inferences/Index_Anomalies/NanBal_June11_Meet/With_Antecedent_SST/Early/SST_Grid_Extracted_Files/Normalized_Quantiles")

bf_data <- read_csv("Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv") %>%
  select(Grid, Bayes.factor)

cor_data <- read_csv("WetCV_Correl.csv")

grid_index <- read_csv("D:/Onedrive_data/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Causality_Inferences/Index_Anomalies/NanBal_June11_Meet/With_Antecedent_SST/grid_index.csv")

corr_sstpq <- read_csv("D:/Onedrive_data/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Causality_Inferences/Index_Anomalies/NanBal_June11_Meet/With_Antecedent_SST/Early/SST_Grid_Extracted_Files/Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

merged_bf <- left_join(grid_index, bf_data, by = "Grid")

merged_corr <- left_join(merged_bf, cor_data, by = "Grid_Number")

final_data <- left_join(merged_corr, corr_sstpq, by = "Grid_Number")

final_data <- final_data %>%
  select(Lat, Lon, Grid, Grid_Number, Bayes.factor, Correlation,
         Corr_ASST_P,Corr_SST_P,Corr_ASST_Q,Corr_SST_Q,Corr_Q_P,Corr_ASST_SST)

write_csv(final_data, "Wet_combined_BF_Corr.csv")


```


**plot bayesfactor for wet dry normal 4*3 grid**
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(maps)
library(sf)
library(grid)

base_path <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/"
seasons   <- c("Early","Peak","Late","Monsoon")
lon_win   <- c(30, 300)
lat_win   <- c(-15, 25)

fix_lon <- function(x) ifelse(x < 0, x + 360, x)


world2_map <- map_data("world2")

india_boundary <- st_read(
    "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Shapefiles/India_Shape_File/India_Country_Boundary.shp",
    quiet = TRUE
) |>
    st_transform(4326) |>
    st_wrap_dateline(options = c("WRAPDATELINE=YES","DATELINEOFFSET=180")) |>
    st_shift_longitude()

india_boundary_df <- india_boundary |>
    st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") |> st_cast("POLYGON") |>
    mutate(id = row_number()) |>
    st_cast("LINESTRING") |>
    st_coordinates() |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    rename(lon = X, lat = Y) |>
    mutate(group = L1, lon = fix_lon(lon))


read_condition_data <- function(condition, base_path, seasons) {
    read_season <- function(season){
        path <- file.path(base_path, season, "Normalized_Quantiles")
        fp   <- file.path(path, paste0(condition, "_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv"))
        if (!file.exists(fp)) return(NULL)
        read.csv(fp) |>
            dplyr::select(Lat, Lon, Grid,  Bayes.factor) |>
            dplyr::mutate(Condition = condition, Phase = season)
    }
    df <- purrr::map_dfr(seasons, read_season)
    if (nrow(df) == 0) stop("No files found for condition = ", condition)
    df |>
        dplyr::mutate(
            Phase = factor(Phase, levels = seasons),
            lon   = fix_lon(Lon),
            lat   = Lat
        )
}

get_season_df <- function(df, season) df %>% dplyr::filter(Phase == season)

# Single panel builder with conditional axis display
make_bf_panel_one <- function(df_one, show_lat_axis = FALSE, show_lon_axis = FALSE, panel_letter = NULL) {
    p <- ggplot() +
        geom_raster(data = df_one, aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
                             midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2, 2), name = "Bayes Factor") +
        geom_polygon(data = world2_map, aes(long, lat, group = group),
                     fill = "gray90", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.25) +
        geom_path(data = india_boundary_df, aes(lon, lat, group = group),
                  color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 0.5) +
        geom_point(data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor >  1),
                   aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "darkred", size = 1.4, stroke = 1.0) +
        geom_point(data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor >= 0.5, Bayes.factor <  1),
                   aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "coral2", size = 1.4, stroke = 1.0) +
        geom_point(data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor <= -0.5, Bayes.factor > -1),
                   aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "purple",  size = 1.4, stroke = 1.0) +
        geom_point(data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor < -1),
                   aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "blue",    size = 1.4, stroke = 1.0) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = lon_win, ylim = lat_win, expand = FALSE) +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
        theme(
            panel.border  = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 2.0),
            panel.grid    = element_line(size = 0.2),
            legend.position = "none",
            plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm")
        ) +
        annotate("text",
                 x = lon_win[1] + 2, y = lat_win[1] + 1.5,
                 label = panel_letter, fontface = "bold", size = 7, color = "red",
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 0)
    
    if (show_lat_axis && show_lon_axis) {
        p <- p +
            scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(60, 300, 60), name = "Longitude") +
            scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 20, 10), name = "Latitude") +
            theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
                  axis.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
                  axis.ticks = element_line())
    } else if (show_lat_axis) {
        p <- p +
            scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(60, 300, 60)) +
            scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 20, 10), name = "Latitude") +
            theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
                  axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
                  axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                  axis.ticks.y = element_line())
    } else if (show_lon_axis) {
        p <- p +
            scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(60, 300, 60), name = "Longitude") +
            scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 20, 10)) +
            theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
                  axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
                  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                  axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
                  axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
    } else {
        # No axes (for internal panels)
        p <- p +
            scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(60, 300, 60)) +
            scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 20, 10)) +
            theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                  axis.text = element_blank(),
                  axis.ticks = element_blank())
    }
    
    return(p)
}


Dry <- read_condition_data("Dry", base_path, seasons)
Normal <- read_condition_data("Normal", base_path, seasons)
Wet <- read_condition_data("Wet", base_path, seasons)


panels <- vector("list", 12)
letters_vec <- c("(a)", "(b)", "(c)", "(d)", "(e)", "(f)", 
                 "(g)", "(h)", "(i)", "(j)", "(k)", "(l)")

for (i in seq_along(seasons)) {
    s <- seasons[i]
    dfL <- get_season_df(Dry, s)
    dfM <- get_season_df(Normal, s)
    dfR <- get_season_df(Wet, s)
    
    #
    show_lat_left <- TRUE  
    show_lon_left <- (s == "Monsoon")  
    show_lon_middle <- (s == "Monsoon")  
    show_lon_right <- (s == "Monsoon") 
    
    pL <- make_bf_panel_one(dfL, 
                            show_lat_axis = show_lat_left, 
                            show_lon_axis = show_lon_left,
                            panel_letter = letters_vec[(i-1)*3 + 1])
    
    pM <- make_bf_panel_one(dfM, 
                            show_lat_axis = (i == 1),  
                            show_lon_axis = show_lon_middle,
                            panel_letter = letters_vec[(i-1)*3 + 2])
    
    pR <- make_bf_panel_one(dfR, 
                            show_lat_axis = FALSE, 
                            show_lon_axis = show_lon_right,
                            panel_letter = letters_vec[(i-1)*3 + 3])
    
    panels[[(i-1)*3 + 1]] <- pL
    panels[[(i-1)*3 + 2]] <- pM
    panels[[(i-1)*3 + 3]] <- pR
}

legend_plot <- ggplot() +
    geom_raster(data = Dry %>% filter(Phase == "Early"), 
                aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
                         midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2, 2), 
                         name = NULL,  
                         guide = guide_colorbar(
                             title.position = "top",
                             title.hjust = 0,
                             title.vjust = 0.5,
                             label.position = "bottom",
                             barwidth = unit(4.0, "cm"),
                             barheight = unit(0.8, "cm"),
                             direction = "horizontal"
                         )) +
    labs(fill = NULL) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 10)),
          legend.box = "horizontal",
          legend.direction = "horizontal")


legend_grob <- ggplotGrob(
    ggplot() +
        geom_raster(data = Dry %>% filter(Phase == "Early"), 
                    aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
                             midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2, 2)) +
        theme(legend.position = "bottom",
              legend.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
              legend.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")) +
        guides(fill = guide_colorbar(
            title = "Bayes Factor",
            title.position = "top",
            title.hjust = 0,
            label.position = "bottom",
            barwidth = unit(15, "cm"),  
            barheight = unit(0.8, "cm")
        ))
)$grobs[[which(sapply(ggplotGrob(
    ggplot() +
        geom_raster(data = Dry %>% filter(Phase == "Early"), 
                    aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
                             midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2, 2)) +
        theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
        guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Bayes Factor"))
)$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")]]

grid_3x4 <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = panels, ncol = 3, align = 'hv')

col_titles <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    ggdraw() + draw_label("Dry", fontface = "bold", size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
    ggdraw() + draw_label("Normal", fontface = "bold", size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
    ggdraw() + draw_label("Wet", fontface = "bold", size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
    ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(1, 1, 1)
)

season_labels <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    ggdraw() + draw_label("Early",   fontface = "bold", size = 30, angle = 270, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    ggdraw() + draw_label("Peak",    fontface = "bold", size = 30, angle = 270, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    ggdraw() + draw_label("Late",    fontface = "bold", size = 30, angle = 270, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    ggdraw() + draw_label("Monsoon", fontface = "bold", size = 30, angle = 270, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1)
)

grid_with_right <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    grid_3x4, season_labels,
    ncol = 2,
    rel_widths = c(1, 0.06)
)

final_plot <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    col_titles,
    grid_with_right,
    legend_grob,
    ncol = 1,
    rel_heights = c(0.06, 1, 0.10)
)


ggsave("BF_Anomalies_Dry_Normal_Wet_3x4WO.png", final_plot,
       width = 28, height = 16, dpi = 400, bg = "white")
# ggsave("BF_Anomalies_Dry_Normal_Wet_3x4.pdf", final_plot, width = 28, height = 22)
```
